prose:
Frontier-orbital energies of TEMPO were computed with the chemkit “frontier-orbitals” skill at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier ‘standard’, density-fitted) using PySCF in the gas phase. A fixed geometry from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz was used (no re-optimization). The molecule was treated as a neutral doublet (charge 0, multiplicity 2) with an unrestricted Kohn–Sham SCF that converged in 12 cycles. No warnings were reported by the engine (warnings array empty). The calculation’s live stdout/stderr was streamed to a frontier_<timestamp>.out file in the working directory; the summarized JSON output is at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpwtn297_q/live.json.

Key results (eV):
• HOMO = −6.3375439 • LUMO = −2.4651235 • HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203
• Vertical IP = 6.3375439 • Vertical EA = 2.4651235
The integrity check reports status “ok”; result deemed trustworthy.
